evidence_label: case-001 lab recipient qualification gate, not contact permission and not treatment advice

source_checks.result: A 2024-2026 thalassemia plus HUDEP2/CD34/erythroid/HbF/HBG query returned 246 records on 2026-06-08.
PMIDs 41259521, 39108322, 39504332, 36769243, 33879818, and 15163316 resolved for assay-model and readout anchors.
The thalassemia fetal hemoglobin CD34 query returned gene-cell therapy benchmark records, not a preclinical lab-recipient list.
Islamic anchors remain research-method motivation only, not biomedical evidence or outreach permission.

qualification_requirements: can receive only public-safe preclinical context before ethics review
can state available model and sample requirements
can measure HbF or HBG plus maturation and viability
can separate HbF signal from toxic or maturation-blocking artifacts
can provide raw data, method metadata, controls, replicate plan, cost, and timeline
can identify ethics, biosafety, MTA, import, or sample constraints without requesting private records
reject_or_hold_conditions: requests raw patient records before approved clinical context
requests patient samples before ethics approval, consent, biosafety review, and clinician oversight
cannot export raw or summarized data
cannot document controls, vehicle, batch, or viability
treats quote request as treatment selection, dosing, trial screening, travel, import, purchase, or procurement guidance
is a therapy or trial center being approached as if it were a preclinical assay lab
decision_rule: Keep lab recipient selection on hold until founder approval exists and at least one recipient class passes the qualification requirements without triggering reject or hold conditions.
